hooks.command: if [ -d docs/coding-sessions ]; then latest=$(ls -t docs/coding-sessions/*_session-summary.md 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); if [ -n "$latest" ]; then echo "Context from previous session ($(basename "$latest")):"; awk '/^## Pending Tasks/{flag=1; print; next} /^##/{flag=0} flag' "$latest"; fi; fi
input=$(cat); re='"command":[[:space:]]*"[^"]*git[[:space:]]+commit'; if [[ "$input" =~ $re ]]; then echo 'Reminder: Use commit-assistant for proper commit formatting.' >&2; fi; exit 0
input=$(cat); re='"command":[[:space:]]*"[^"]*git[[:space:]]+push'; if [[ "$input" =~ $re ]]; then echo 'Reminder: Run push-assistant agent before pushing code.' >&2; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); re='"command":[[:space:]]*"[^"]*gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create'; if [[ "$input" =~ $re ]]; then echo 'Reminder: Consider running ami-pr-conflict-detector or ami-pr-publisher before creating PR.' >&2; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path":[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ -f "$file" ]; then if git ls-files --error-unmatch "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then added=$(git diff -U0 "$file" 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^\+[^\+]'); else added=$(cat "$file" 2>/dev/null); fi; if echo "$added" | grep -qE 'console\.log|debugger|TODO|FIXME'; then echo "Warning: Detected debug statements or TODOs in modified lines of $file. Review before commit." >&2; fi; fi
